LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_TopWarning: Changing these options will require restarting the game to apply. Changing genes will not affect already created pawns.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_BottomWarning: Don't see the options you chose? Restart your game!
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_RemoveBruxaSoftD: Stops new Bruxa from spawning whenever a Sanguophage is generated. Will not affect already created pawns.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_BruxaBodyStandar: Currently, Bruxa can spawn with any body type. This will make sure they always spawn with a Standard body.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_BruxaRemoveHairD: Removes the Sanguine Hair gene from the Bruxa, making it more compatible with non-baseliner xenotypes.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_BruxaPerfectBody: Bruxa will have the Perfect Body gene.\n\nRequires Vanilla Races Expanded - Highmates.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_RemoveEkkimianSo: Stops new Ekkimian from spawning whenever a Sanguophage is generated. Will not affect already created pawns.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_EkkimianBothBatE: Gives Ekkimians access to both bat ears added by VRE Sanguophage, adding to their visual diversity.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_EkkimianRemoveBa: Ekkimians will not have either bat ear gene, adding to their skeletal appearance.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_EkkimianBeardles: Gives Ekkimians the Beardless gene, adding to their skeletal appearance.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_EkkimianBodyPlus: Gives Ekkimians access to the Hulk gene (in addition to the Thin and Standard options they start with).
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_EkkimianBodyAny: Ekkimians Can Be Any Body Type
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_EkkimianBodyAnyD: Removes all body type genes from the Ekkimians, allowing them to spawn with any body type.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_EkkimianGauntBod: Ekkimians will have the Gaunt Body gene.\n\nRequires Vanilla Races Expanded - Waster.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_RemoveStrigoiSof: Stops new Strigoi from spawning whenever a Sanguophage is generated. Will not affect already created pawns.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_StrigoiBothBatEa: Gives Strigoi access to both bat ears added by VRE Sanguophage, adding to their bestial appearance.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_StrigoiRemoveBat: Strigoi will not have either bat ear gene, making them look more human.
Strigoi will no longer have a bat nose, making them look more human.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_StrigoiRemoveHai: Gives Strigoi the Bald gene, adding to their bestial appearance.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_StrigoiBeardless: Gives Strigoi the Beardless gene, adding to their bestial appearance.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_StrigoiNonSkinny: Strigoi will not spawn with skinny bodies, making them look less wimpy.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_StrigoiLargeBody: Strigoi will only spawn with fat or hulk bodies, making them look larger.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_StrigoiHulkBodyD: Strigoi will only spawn with hulk bodies, making them look more intimidating.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_RemoveBloodmoonD: Disables the Blood Moon incident. This is safe to do on any save, even if a Blood Moon event is currently happening. It will not end the current Blood Moon, but will stop the next one.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_HemogenicHalfHun: Hemogenic pawns lose hunger at half of their normal rate.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_HemogenicNoHunge: Hemogenic pawns can, but don't need to, eat.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_HemogenicHideHed: When disabled, you won't see the Hemogenic Hunger hediff (the hediff added by either of the two options above) in the pawn's health tab.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_GenesRegrowOneYe: Genes will regrow in one year, half of the vanilla time.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_GenesRegrowHalfY: Genes Regrow in Half a Year
Genes will regrow in half a year, a quarter of the vanilla time.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VRESanguophage_BaselinerForcedD: Sanguophages can only spawn as baseliners, instead of other endotypes (like Dirtmoles or Pigskins).
